title: The Icarus Modding Discord Server
body: This is the unofficial modding Discord server for Icarus. It's a great place to get help with modding, ask questions, and meet other modders.

title: The Icarus Modding Upvote Page
body: Upvote or add new mods you'd like to see for Icarus. It's a great way to let us know what you want to see in the future.
